title: Robust Dispatch Order Reception in Shared Autonomous Electric Vehicle Fleets Using IRS-Assisted V2X Communications
authors: Eiman ElGhanam, Mohamed S. Hassan, Ahmed Osman
publish: 2026 7th International Conference on Communications, Signal Processing, and their Applications (ICCSPA)
title_zh: 共享自主电动汽车车队基于IRS辅助V2X通信的可靠调度指令接收
